• 5G connectivity for high-speed downloads, streaming and video calls

name: Apple AirPods Pro 3 (Official Importer)
description:
The Apple AirPods Pro 3 deliver outstanding sound quality, maximum comfort and seamless connectivity across your Apple devices.
• Active Noise Cancellation (ANC) for rich, balanced sound without distractions
• Innovative ergonomic design for maximum comfort, even during long sessions and workouts
• MagSafe and USB-C charging for fast, convenient top-ups
• Advanced H2 chip for a fast, stable connection to Apple devices
Official importer warranty · brand-new, sealed box

name: Samsung Galaxy S25 Edge 256GB
description:
The Samsung Galaxy S25 Edge 256GB is a premium smartphone with a slim, elegant body, powerful performance and a stunning display.
• 6.7-inch Dynamic AMOLED 2X screen with QHD+ resolution and a 120Hz refresh rate
• Snapdragon-series processor with 12GB of RAM for smooth, fast performance
• 256GB of storage running Android 15 with the One UI interface
• IP68 water and dust resistance with reinforced glass
• 5G, Dual SIM, fast and wireless charging, and an under-display fingerprint sensor
Official Samsung importer warranty · brand-new, sealed box

name: Samsung Galaxy S26 256GB
description:
The Samsung Galaxy S26 256GB is Samsung's newest flagship, pairing next-generation processing power with an advanced camera system and a rugged build.
• Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 or Exynos 2600 chip on a 3nm process (region-dependent)
• Dynamic AMOLED 2X display with an adaptive 120Hz refresh rate
• 50MP main camera with OIS, 10MP 3x telephoto and 12MP ultra-wide, plus 8K video
• 256GB storage with 12GB RAM for smooth multitasking
• IP68 water and dust resistance, Gorilla Armor 2 front glass, Android 16 with One UI 8.5
Official Samsung importer warranty · brand-new, sealed box

name: Samsung Galaxy S26 512GB
description:
The Samsung Galaxy S26 512GB is Samsung's flagship with generous storage, combining next-generation performance, an advanced camera system and high durability.
• Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 or Exynos 2600 chip on a 3nm process (region-dependent)
• Dynamic AMOLED 2X display with an adaptive 120Hz refresh rate
• 50MP main camera with OIS, 10MP 3x telephoto and 12MP ultra-wide, plus 8K video
• 512GB storage with 12GB RAM for ample space and smooth multitasking
• IP68 water and dust resistance, Gorilla Armor 2 front glass, Android 16 with One UI 8.5
Official Samsung importer warranty · brand-new, sealed box

name: Samsung Galaxy S26+ 256GB
description:
The Samsung Galaxy S26+ 256GB is a flagship with a large, striking display and elite performance for an uncompromising everyday experience.
• Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 or Exynos 2600 chip on a 3nm process (region-dependent)
• 6.7-inch Dynamic LTPO AMOLED 2X, QHD+ (1440x3120), 120Hz refresh and up to 2600 nits peak brightness
• 50MP main camera with OIS, 10MP 3x telephoto, 12MP ultra-wide and 12MP front, plus 8K video
• 256GB storage with 12GB RAM
• IP68 rating, Gorilla Armor 2 front and Victus 2 back glass, Armor Aluminum 2 frame, Android 16 with One UI 8.5
Official Samsung importer warranty · brand-new, sealed box

name: Samsung Galaxy S26+ 512GB
description:
The Samsung Galaxy S26+ 512GB is a flagship with a large display, huge storage and elite performance for every need.
• Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 or Exynos 2600 chip on a 3nm process (region-dependent)
• 6.7-inch Dynamic LTPO AMOLED 2X, QHD+ (1440x3120), 120Hz refresh and up to 2600 nits peak brightness
• 50MP main camera with OIS, 10MP 3x telephoto, 12MP ultra-wide and 12MP front, plus 8K video
• 512GB storage with 12GB RAM for ample space and smooth performance
• IP68 rating, Gorilla Armor 2 front and Victus 2 back glass, Armor Aluminum 2 frame, Android 16 with One UI 8.5
Official Samsung importer warranty · brand-new, sealed box

name: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra 256GB
description:
The Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra 256GB is Samsung's top-tier flagship, combining a huge display, powerful performance and an elegant design for an uncompromising experience.
• Large 6.9-inch display for immersive viewing
• 12GB RAM for fast, smooth multitasking
• 256GB internal storage for all your photos, videos and apps
• Battery built to last through a full day
• Sleek design that stays comfortable to carry every day
Official Samsung importer warranty · brand-new, sealed box

name: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra 512GB
description:
The Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra 512GB sits at the peak of Samsung's technology and photography, with a built-in S Pen and a pro-grade quad camera array.
• Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 for Galaxy chip on a 3nm process
• 6.9-inch Dynamic AMOLED 2X, QHD+ resolution, adaptive 1-120Hz refresh, with a built-in S Pen
• Quad camera: 200MP main (f/1.4), 50MP ultra-wide, 50MP telephoto with 5x optical zoom and 10MP telephoto with 3x zoom; 12MP front
• 512GB UFS storage with 12GB RAM
• 5,000mAh battery, 60W fast wired charging and 25W wireless charging
Official Samsung importer warranty · brand-new, sealed box

name: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra 1TB
description:
The Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra 1TB is Samsung's top-tier flagship with a massive 1TB of storage, a built-in S Pen and a pro-grade quad camera array.
• Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 for Galaxy chip on a 3nm process
• 6.9-inch Dynamic AMOLED 2X, QHD+ resolution, adaptive 1-120Hz refresh, with a built-in S Pen
• Quad camera: 200MP main (f/1.4), 50MP ultra-wide, 50MP telephoto with 5x optical zoom and 10MP telephoto with 3x zoom; 12MP front
• 1TB storage with 12GB RAM for fast performance even under heavy load
• 5,000mAh battery, 60W fast wired charging and 25W wireless charging
Official Samsung importer warranty · brand-new, sealed box
